Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Gordon Eaton

RULING:
DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Crane Co.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether exposure to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to his asbestos-related illness. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Jennifer Seelenbacher of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11878 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
